features.name: Operators (arithmetic, comparison, logical, bitwise)
features.description: All standard operators including ternary
features.wat:
(func $calc (param f64 f64) (result f64)
    local.get 0
    local.get 1
    f64.add
    f64.const 1
    f64.const 0
    local.get 0
    local.get 1
    f64.eq
    select
    f64.add
    f64.const 1
    f64.const 0
    local.get 0
    f64.const 0
  ...
)
features.jsHtml:
function calc(a: number, b: number): number {
  const sum = a + b;
  const eq = a === b ? 1 : 0;
  const both = a > 0 && b > 0 ? 1 : 0;
  return sum + eq + both;
}
features.watHtml:
(func $calc (param f64 f64) (result f64)
    local.get 0
    local.get 1
    f64.add
    f64.const 1
    f64.const 0
    local.get 0
    local.get 1
    f64.eq
    select
    f64.add
    f64.const 1
    f64.const 0
    local.get 0
    f64.const 0
  ...
)

features.jsHtml:
function firstPair(n: number): number {
  outer: for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
      if (i !== j) break outer;
    }
  }
  return 0;
}

features.name: Control flow
features.description: Branching, loops, and switch statements
features.wat:
(func $abs (param f64) (result f64)
    local.get 0
    f64.const 0
    f64.gt
    (if
      (then
      local.get 0
      return
      )
      (else
      local.get 0
      f64.neg
      return
      )
    )
  ...
)
features.jsHtml:
function abs(x: number): number {

}

features.jsHtml:
function safeDiv(a: number, b: number): number {
  try {
    if (b === 0) throw new Error("div by zero");
    return a / b;
  } catch (e) {
    return -1;
  }
}

features.jsHtml:
class Point {
  x: number;
  y: number;
  constructor(x: number, y: number) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
  }
  dist(): number {
    return Math.sqrt(this.x * this.x + this.y * this.y);
  }
}

features.name: Strings
features.description: String methods, concatenation, and manipulation
features.wat:
(func $greet (param externref) (result externref)
    global.get 1
    local.get 0
    call 0
    return
  )
features.jsHtml:
function greet(name: string): string {
  return "Hello " + name;
}

function initials(first: string, last: string): string {
  return first.slice(0, 1) + last.slice(0, 1);
}
features.watHtml:
(func $greet (param externref) (result externref)
    global.get 1
    local.get 0
    call 0
    return
  )

class Circle {
  private _r: number;
  constructor(r: number) { this._r = r; }
  get radius(): number { return this._r; }
  set radius(v: number) { this._r = v; }
}

features.jsHtml:
function* range(n: number): Generator<number> {
  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) yield i;
}

function sumRange(n: number): number {
  let sum = 0;
  for (const x of range(n)) sum += x;
  return sum;
}

features.name: Classes
features.description: Class declarations, inheritance, and method override
features.explain: Constructor, methods, extends, super, and virtual dispatch work. Dynamic prototype lookup is partial.

features.jsHtml:
class Animal {
  name: string;
  constructor(name: string) { this.name = name; }
  speak(): string { return this.name + " speaks"; }
}

class Dog extends Animal {
  speak(): string { return this.name + " barks"; }
}

const d = new Dog("Rex");
const msg = d.speak(); // "Rex barks"

    return

class Vec2 { x: number; y: number; constructor(x: number, y: number) { this.x = x; this.y = y; } }
function move(v: Vec2, dx: number, dy: number): Vec2 {
  return { ...v, x: v.x + dx, y: v.y + dy };
}

async function sum(iter: AsyncIterable<number>): Promise<number> {
  let total = 0;
  for await (const n of iter) { total += n; }
  return total;
}

features.name: RegExp duplicate named groups
features.description: Same named capture groups across alternatives

features.name: var hoisting
features.description: Function-scoped var declarations hoisted to function top
features.explain: var declarations are hoisted. Full TDZ semantics for let/const.
features.wat:
(func $hoisted (result f64)
    (local $x f64)
    local.get 0
    call 0
    f64.const 5
    local.set 0
    local.get 0
    return
  )
features.jsHtml:
function hoisted(): number {
  console.log(x); // undefined (hoisted)
  var x = 5;
  return x;
}
features.watHtml:
(func $hoisted (result f64)
    (local $x f64)
    local.get 0
    call 0
    f64.const 5
    local.set 0
    local.get 0
    return
  )

features.name: arguments.callee
features.description: Reference to the currently executing function
features.explain: Forbidden in strict mode. Use named function expressions instead.
features.jsHtml:
(function factorial(n) {
  return n <= 1 ? 1 : n * arguments.callee(n - 1);
})(5); // not supported

features.name: __proto__ accessor

obj.__proto__ = protoObj; // not supported

features.name: Hono-style router (Map + closures + classes)
features.description: Hono web-framework patterns: class-based router, Map route table, closure handlers, method chaining
features.wat:
(func $Context_text (param (ref null 7) externref) (result externref)
    local.get 1
    return
  )
features.jsHtml:
type Handler = (c: Context) => string;

class Context {
  path: string;
  constructor(path: string) { this.path = path; }
  text(s: string): string { return s; }
}

class App {
  routes: Map<string, Handler> = new Map();

  get(path: string, handler: Handler): App {
    this.routes.set(path, handler);
    return this;
  }

  dispatch(path: string): string {
    const handler = this.routes.get(path);
    if (handler == null) return "404 Not Found";
    return handler(new Context(path));
  }
}

const app = new App();
app.get("/", c => c.text("Hello, World!"))
   .get("/api/users", c => c.text("Users: Alice, Bob"))
   .get("/api/health", c => c.text("ok"));

console.log(app.dispatch("/"));          // Hello, World!
console.log(app.dispatch("/api/users")); // Users: Alice, Bob
console.log(app.dispatch("/404"));       // 404 Not Found

features.name: Decorators
features.description: Syntax for class and method metadata annotation
features.explain: Stage 3 proposal. Decorator transform not yet in scope.
features.jsHtml:
@sealed
class Foo {
  @log
  method() {}
} // not yet

features.name: Pattern matching
features.description: Structural pattern matching with match expression
features.explain: Stage 1 proposal. Structural pattern matching not yet in scope.
features.jsHtml:
const result = match (value) {
  when ({ type: "a" }): "A";
  when ({ type: "b" }): "B";
}; // not yet
